questions.question: What is meant by hard water?

answers.a: Water containing Ca<sup>2+</sup> and Mg<sup>2+</sup> ions
answers.c: Water containing Cl<sup>-</sup> and Br<sup>-</sup> ions
answers.d: Water containing PO<sub>4</sub><sup>3-</sup> and SO<sub>4</sub><sup>2-</sup> ions

questions.question: The resin used for ion exchange should contains:

answers.b: Larger ions than those in hard water
answers.c: ions that diffuse faster than in those in water

questions.question: The ion exchange column contains a microporous exchange resin usually made of ?
Soap is not effective for cleaning when the water
What is the necessary property of the resin used to remove the hardness of water

answers.a: It should be a cation exchange resin
answers.b: It should be an anion exchange resin
